body.title: Akien: install Ollama and pull inference models for local $0 tier
body.result: done — Ollama installed and models pulled; capitalization updated in machines config
body.description:
The inference proxy Level 1 (local Ollama, $0) and Level 2 (pattern intercept → local model) both require a running Ollama instance with at least one model pulled.

Models needed by the rules engine:
- Minion tier: qwen3.5-9b or similar small model (available via ollama)
- Worker tier: any 30B+ coding model if hardware supports it

**Steps:**
1. Install Ollama: https://ollama.com/download (Linux: curl -fsSL https://ollama.com/install.sh | sh)
2. Pull a minion model: ollama pull qwen2.5:7b (or qwen3:8b when available)
3. Set env: INFERENCE_ENDPOINT=http://127.0.0.1:11434 (this is already the default)
4. Verify: python3 -c "from devices.inference.sources import OllamaSource; s=OllamaSource(); print(s.ping())"

**Affected files:** ~/.unseen_university/.env (optional — default endpoint already correct)
**Design rules:** No live keys in source.
**Scope boundary:** Ollama install + model pull only. Granny and inference proxy will auto-detect when Ollama is available.
**Completion criteria:** OllamaSource().ping() returns True; at least one model is pullable.
